augments.name: Scoped Weapon

augments.effect: Gain 40% Attack Speed.

augments.name: Leg Day

augments.name: Witchful Thinking
augments.effect: Gain 70 Ability Power.

augments.name: Blunt Force
augments.effect: Gain 20% Attack Damage.

augments.name: ReEnergize
augments.effect: Gain 40 Ability Haste.

augments.name: Buff Buddies

augments.name: Tank It Or Leave It
augments.effect: Gain 25% Critical Strike chance and the ability to critically defend to reduce damage taken.

augments.name: Frost Wraith
augments.effect: Every 7 seconds, your next attack roots the target.

augments.name: Homeguard
augments.effect: Gain the Homeguard movement speed effect at all times while out of combat.

augments.name: Goredrink
augments.effect: Heal for a portion of your missing health when dealing damage.

augments.name: Slap Around
augments.effect: Immobilizing an enemy increases your damage dealt to them.

augments.name: Stats!

augments.name: ADAPt

augments.name: Weighted Popoffs
augments.effect: Gain a burst of movement speed after casting an ability.

augments.name: Speed Demon
augments.effect: Gain bonus movement speed based on your total Attack Speed.

augments.name: Ice Cold
augments.effect: Increase the effectiveness of your slow effects.

augments.name: Typhoon
augments.effect: Your attacks fire bolts at two nearby enemies.

augments.name: Mind to Matter
augments.effect: Gain maximum health equal to a percentage of your maximum mana.

augments.name: Dive Bomber

augments.name: escAPADe
augments.effect: Convert your Attack Damage into Ability Power.

augments.name: Infernal Soul
augments.effect: Gain the Infernal Dragon Soul.

augments.name: Ocean Soul
augments.effect: Gain the Ocean Dragon Soul.

augments.name: Mighty Shield
augments.effect: Increases the strength of shields you grant to yourself or allies.

augments.name: Wind Beneath Blade
augments.effect: Gain Attack Speed for a short duration after using a dash, leap, or blink.

augments.name: Adamant
augments.effect: Gain bonus Armor and Magic Resistance.

augments.name: Self Destruct
augments.effect: Damaging an enemy also deals a portion of that damage to yourself but increases overall output.

augments.name: Upgrade Zhonya's
augments.effect: Gain an upgraded Zhonya's Hourglass with lower active cooldown.

augments.name: Light 'em Up!

augments.name: Upgrade Immolate

augments.name: Tormentor

augments.name: Spin To Win

augments.name: Flashbang
augments.effect: Your Flash blinds nearby enemies for 2 seconds.

augments.name: First-Aid Kit
augments.effect: Gain 25% Heal and Shield Power.

augments.name: Executioner
augments.effect: Deal 10% increased damage to enemies below 30% health and reset basic abilities on takedown.

augments.name: Erosion

augments.name: Guilty Pleasure
augments.effect: Immobilizing an enemy champion heals you for a percentage of your max health.

augments.name: Hat on a Hat
augments.effect: Gain Ability Power for every unique item in your inventory with a 'Hat' or 'Cap' in its name.

augments.name: Poltergeist
augments.effect: Gain stacking Ability Haste every time you cast a spell.

augments.name: Swift and Safe
augments.effect: Gain a shield after using a dash, blink, or leap.

augments.name: Ultimate Unstoppable

augments.name: Veil of Warding
augments.effect: Gain a spell shield that refreshes every 40 seconds.

augments.name: FireFox
augments.effect: Your next ability fires a homing flame at the target.

augments.name: Apex Inventor
augments.effect: Reduce item active and passive cooldowns by 75%.

augments.name: Firebrand
augments.effect: Your attacks apply a stacking burn that deals magic damage over time.

augments.name: Flashy

augments.name: Soul Siphon

augments.name: Marksmage

augments.name: The Brutalizer

augments.name: Thread the Needle

augments.name: Vampirism

augments.name: Big Brain

augments.name: Upgrade Sword of Blossoming Dawn

augments.name: Shieldmaiden

augments.name: Sonata

augments.name: Archmage

augments.name: Stackosaurus Rex

augments.name: Scopiest Weapons

augments.name: Biggest Snowball Ever

augments.effect: Your abilities can critically strike and you gain Crit Chance based on AP.

augments.name: Infernal Conduit

augments.name: Goliath

augments.name: Fey Magic
augments.effect: Damaging an enemy with your ultimate polymorphs them for 2 seconds.

augments.name: Clown College
augments.effect: Summon a Shaco-style clone when you use your ultimate or fall below 40% health.

augments.name: Quest: Sneakerhead
augments.effect: Travel a long distance to gain permanent Movement Speed and a Golden Boots item.

augments.name: Back to Basics
augments.effect: Disable your item actives and passives to gain 50% increased damage and health.

augments.name: Giant Slayer
augments.effect: Become tiny, gaining 20% Movement Speed and dealing more damage to larger enemies.

augments.name: Tap Dancer
augments.effect: Your attacks grant stacking movement speed and attack speed indefinitely.

augments.name: Quantum Computing
augments.effect: Automatically deal damage in a ring around you every few seconds.

augments.name: Symphony of War
augments.effect: Gain the Lethal Tempo and Conqueror keystone runes.

augments.name: Omni Soul

augments.effect: Randomly change size and gain various stat boosts every 30 seconds.

augments.name: Goldrend

augments.name: Baby Kitty

augments.name: Draw Your Sword
augments.effect: Lose all attack range (become melee) to gain massive AD, HP, and resistances.

augments.name: Empyrean Promise
augments.effect: Gain stats for every nearby ally and grant them a portion of those stats.

augments.name: Dashing
augments.effect: Your dash, leap, and blink abilities have 200 Ability Haste.

augments.name: Mystic Punch
augments.effect: Your attacks reduce your ability cooldowns by 1 second on hit.

augments.name: Snowball Roulette

augments.name: Slow Cooker

augments.name: Can't Touch This

augments.name: Blade Waltz

augments.name: Windspeaker's Blessing
augments.effect: Your heals and shields grant the target increased Armor and Magic Resistance.

augments.name: Ominous Pact
augments.effect: Sacrifice 30% of your max health to gain a massive amount of adaptive force.

augments.name: King Me

augments.name: Protein Shake

augments.name: Glass Cannon

augments.name: Circle of Death

augments.name: Eureka
augments.effect: Gain Ability Haste equal to 30% of your Ability Power.

augments.name: Infinite Recursion

augments.name: Dual Wield
augments.effect: Gain 100% Attack Speed but your attacks deal 30% less damage.

augments.name: Dropkick

augments.name: Void Rift

augments.name: Cruelty

augments.name: Pandora's Box
augments.effect: Your items are randomized into different items of the same tier every few minutes.

augments.name: Quest: Icathia's Fall

augments.name: Stats on Stats on Stats!
augments.effect: Increase all of your stats by 25%.

augments.name: Cerberus

augments.name: Courage of the Colossus

augments.name: Gash

augments.name: Heads Up Cupcake!

augments.name: Master of Duality
